subject: 2020 Democratic debates and major Supreme Court rulings
body:
### Flipboard

## Biggest news stories from the past week.

<image>

### 5 things we learned from two nights of Democratic debates
**usatoday.com / Aamer Madhani** The first Democratic presidential debates of the 2020 cycle are now behind us. Multiple candidates broke into Spanish. White House hopefuls offered up... read more

---

<image>

### Supreme Court Green-Lights Gerrymandering and Blocks Census Citizenship Question
**nytimes.com / ADAM LIPTAK** WASHINGTON – In a pair of decisions with vast implications for the American political landscape, the Supreme Court on Thursday delivered a victory to... read more

---

<image>

### iPhone designer Jony Ive is leaving Apple
**cnet.com / by Ian Sherr** The celebrated tech designer, who worked with co-founder Steve Jobs on the iMac, iPod and iPhone, is starting his own firm. Apple will be a primary... read more

---

<image>

### G-20 leaders clash over values, face calls to protect growth
**apnews.com / ELAINE KURTENBACH and FOSTER KLUG, Associated Press** OSAKA, Japan (AP) – World leaders attending a Group of 20 summit in Japan that began Friday are clashing over values that have served for decades as the... read more

---

<image>

### House passes $4.6 billion border bill as leaders cave to moderate Democrats and GOP
**washingtonpost.com / Erica Werner, Mike DeBonis, Rachael Bade** The House passed a $4.6 billion emergency spending bill for the humanitarian crisis on the U.S.-Mexico border Thursday, after Democratic leaders... read more

---

<image>

### U.S. Supreme Court to hear Trump bid to ditch 'Dreamers' immigration program
**reuters.com / Lawrence Hurley** WASHINGTON (Reuters) - The U.S. Supreme Court on Friday agreed to decide whether President Donald Trump acted lawfully when he moved to end a program... read more

---

<image>

### Trump taps Melania Trump's spokeswoman as next White House press secretary
**cnn.com / Kate Bennett, CNN** (CNN) – Melania Trump's spokeswoman Stephanie Grisham will get a major new role as both White House press secretary and communications director, the... read more

---

<image>

### Acting Customs and Border Protection Commissioner John Sanders resigns
**axios.com / Alayna Treene** John Sanders, the acting commissioner of Customs and Border Protection, announced in an internal email Tuesday that he had handed in his resignation ... read more

---

<image>

### Twitter will label, but not delete, tweets from politicians who violate its rules
**nbcnews.com / Ben Kesslen** “A critical function of our service is providing a place where people can openly and publicly respond to their leaders," Twitter said Thursday. Twitter... read more

---

<image>

### House Oversight panel authorizes subpoena for Kellyanne Conway
**politico.com / ANDREW DESIDERIO** Democrats are demanding the Trump counselor testify about alleged violations of the Hatch Act. The House Oversight and Reform Committee voted on... read more

---

Check out The Daily Edition for the biggest stories in news, business, tech, sports and entertainment.
